Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settltment
Off Calendar Feb-27-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Laralei Paras, Esq. 510-848-8880 of the Chanler Group for Plaintiff PETER ENGLANDER.
Jad Davis, Esq. 949-417-0999 of Kutak Rock LLP - Irvine for Defendant Arctic Cat, Inc.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. Parties report the matter is uncontested, party appeared to present an order and judgment.

PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement and Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the motion complies with the Health & Safety Code.

Order and Judgment signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)
